title: sedum australe
intro: Sedum australe, also known as Blue Leaf Sedum or Blue Leaf Ice Plant, is a succulent plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including its ability to improve cardiovascular health, lower cholesterol levels, and boost the immune system. Sedum australe can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
